source: Individual → Business (C2B) Scenario Pack (illustrative, non-exhaustive · not legal advice · counsel review required) · Mal-CRAM-US-01 v2.3 (CRAM-US-2026-07-FREEZE-03) · MAL-TA-01 v1.0 · MSB Compliance Risk Typology Register (Draft v0.1) · MAL-TM-PPC-CATALOG v1.0 (C2B, 16 purpose codes)
note: Individual pays a business (C2B). The individual is scored; the business is the payee — a second screened party (sanctions/50%-rule/adverse media + prohibited-end-type + licensed-whitelist gate). Residence is the gate; the C2B purpose & beneficiary set the hard gates. Guidance only; the customer rating is set by the CRAM composite.

scenarios.title: Pakistani national, resident Karachi — salaried, paying licensed merchants (goods/utilities/fees)
scenarios.profile: Textile-export employee, salaried; pays licensed local businesses for goods, utilities, school fees and government fees.
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted, passes G0) · nationality PK · SoW/SoF = PK salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 goods · C2B-03 utilities · C2B-05 school fees · C2B-09 government fees — licensed/closed-set businesses
scenarios.corridor: US→PK / PK-domestic High (EWRA override); floors to High on corridor concentration
scenarios.screening: Customer: sanctions/PEP/adverse-media clear. Business: licensed local merchants, utility/government whitelist — clear
scenarios.rating: High — EDD mandatory (corridor), not because of the person
scenarios.documents: CNIC/passport; PK PoA <90d; employer letter + 3 payslips + 3-month salary statements (SoF); expected-activity profile. Above tier for goods/services: invoice on request
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; recurring utility/fee payments; occasional goods purchases proportionate to income
scenarios.behaviourWatch: MCC-vs-purpose mismatch; goods payments to a payee with no goods trade (transaction laundering); 'services' round-amount recurring with no footprint (TYP-PK-003); fees for unrelated third parties at scale
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/monitored. Escalate on invoice-cover or transaction-laundering signals

scenarios.title: Pakistani freelancer — paying a 'consulting' business with no deliverable (fake-invoice value transfer)
scenarios.profile: Self-described freelancer making round-sum recurring payments to a 'consulting/management-services' company with no evidence of deliverables.
scenarios.segment: Freelancer / platform earner (High) on a High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence PK · nationality PK · SoW/SoF nominally freelance income
scenarios.flow: C2B-02 purchase of services — beneficiary is a consulting/shell-type business
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; TYP-PK-003 fictitious-invoice / fake-service laundering (OS-TM-032)
scenarios.screening: Customer clear; business adverse-media / shell markers screened (vague 'consulting', secrecy-jurisdiction links)
scenarios.documents: Engagement letter / contract + deliverable description + payer-relationship; invoice-vs-deliverable reconciliation; business KYB where visible
scenarios.expectedActivity: Service payments coherent with a genuine engagement
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Round-amount + recurrence conjunction; no service footprint; circular payments; consulting-fee share of outflows
scenarios.sarPosture: No genuine service substance → value-transfer laundering → SAR; decline/exit the flow
scenarios.outcome: EDD; decline the payment / exit on confirmed invoice-cover

scenarios.title: Pakistani national — crypto-exchange funding to an unlicensed VASP (High-gate)
scenarios.profile: Salaried customer funding a crypto exchange; the exchange is not on the licensed-VASP whitelist; rapid in-convert-out pattern.
scenarios.segment: Crypto user (Critical) on a High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence PK · nationality PK · SoF = salary + prior inflows
scenarios.flow: C2B-12 crypto-exchange funding — beneficiary VASP unlicensed / not whitelisted
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; conduit-shape; crypto-layering
scenarios.screening: Customer clear; VASP fails the licensed-whitelist gate; wallet-cluster / sanctioned-wallet screen
scenarios.rating: High → decline on the gate; block on sanctioned-wallet exposure
scenarios.documents: Same-name check (funding own-name account only); licensed-VASP whitelist status; wallet ownership + funding source + chain-analysis + travel-rule data
scenarios.expectedActivity: If any crypto: only to a licensed/whitelisted VASP in own name, proportionate volume
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Funding an unlicensed VASP / P2P broker posing as a business; rapid in-convert-out; velocity above tier cap; mixer/sanctioned-wallet adjacency
scenarios.sarPosture: Sanctioned-wallet exposure → block + SAR; unlicensed VASP → decline the payment
scenarios.outcome: Decline (unlicensed-VASP gate) / Block + SAR on sanctioned-wallet exposure

scenarios.title: Afghan national resident in Pakistan — restricted-country nationality, paying PK businesses (Rule 1 vs screening)
scenarios.profile: Afghan passport-holder legally resident in Pakistan on a work visa, salaried; pays PK licensed businesses. Wealth is PK-earned (no Afghanistan money nexus).
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium) on a High corridor with restricted-nationality overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted, passes G0) · nationality AF (restricted, non-OFAC) · SoW/SoF = PK salary · no Afghanistan nexus
scenarios.flow: C2B-01/03/05/09 to PK licensed businesses; no Afghanistan beneficiary
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High + restricted-nationality screening escalation; Afghanistan beneficiary/corridor blocked
scenarios.screening: Afghan nationality → screening escalation + EDD flag (not a block; no Afghanistan money/beneficiary nexus). Restricted-country nexus screening on beneficiaries
scenarios.documents: Passport + PK residence/visa + tenure; PK PoA; employer letter + payslips (SoF); confirm no Afghanistan-based beneficiary; nexus screening on payees
scenarios.expectedActivity: PK-salary in; payments to PK licensed businesses only
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Afghanistan-based beneficiary (→ reject); restricted-country payee links; funnel-into-business signals
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/EDD; Afghanistan beneficiaries disabled. If SoW later shows Afghanistan origin → Rule 1 documentary path, else decline

scenarios.title: Iranian national resident in Pakistan — prohibited-absolute nexus / paying an Iran-linked business (block)
scenarios.profile: Iranian passport-holder resident in Pakistan; wants to pay a business in Iran or an Iran-linked entity; SoW traces to Iran.
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted) BUT nationality IR (prohibited-absolute) + Iran SoW + Iran-linked beneficiary
scenarios.flow: Any C2B with an Iran nexus (beneficiary business in/linked to Iran)
scenarios.corridor: Iran comprehensively sanctioned; any nexus blocks (CRAM §7.1)
scenarios.screening: G1 fails — prohibited-country passport + money/beneficiary nexus = Prohibited (Rule 3 final clause); or sanctioned beneficiary
scenarios.documents: None — no document cures a prohibited/sanctioned nexus
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Iran-linked beneficiary on an existing customer → block
scenarios.sarPosture: Block + SAR; OFAC blocking report within 10 business days if funds captured
scenarios.outcome: Decline / Block + SAR + OFAC report

scenarios.title: Egyptian national, resident Cairo — salaried, paying licensed businesses; parallel-FX-via-services watch
scenarios.profile: Salaried multinational employee paying licensed businesses for goods/services; some 'service' payments timed to FX gaps.
scenarios.geography: Residence EG (permitted, grey-list) · nationality EG · SoW/SoF = EG salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 goods · C2B-02 services — licensed businesses; watch FX-timed 'services'
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High — parallel-market FX via services, TBML, charity-channel typologies, currency-exchange abuse
scenarios.screening: Customer/business clear
scenarios.documents: National ID/passport; PoA <90d; employer letter + payslips + statements; invoice on request above tier
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; proportionate goods/services payments to licensed businesses
scenarios.behaviourWatch: 'Services' payments timed to FX-rate gaps; structuring around FX limits; goods payments with no MCC match; charity onward flows
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/EDD. 'FX/money-changing' business payee → unregistered money transmission → escalate/decline

scenarios.title: Egyptian self-employed importer — paying a foreign supplier business (TBML on goods/import)
scenarios.profile: Self-employed sole trader paying an import/supplier business; declared goods/values don't reconcile with shipping.
scenarios.segment: Self-employed / sole trader (High) on a High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence EG · nationality EG · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 purchase of goods (import) — supplier business abroad
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High; TBML (trade_based_ml); OS-TM-008/030–032/035
scenarios.screening: Customer/business screened; supplier jurisdiction corridor-checked
scenarios.documents: Trade licence + financials; for the goods leg: commercial invoices, bills of lading, customs declarations, contracts for reconciliation; supplier KYB
scenarios.expectedActivity: Import payments reconciling to shipping/customs and business scale
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Over/under-invoicing; phantom shipments; payment to a third country unrelated to trade; unit-price outliers
scenarios.sarPosture: Invoice/goods/route mismatch → TBML → SAR; decline the flow on no lawful economic purpose
scenarios.outcome: EDD if documents reconcile; decline + SAR on mismatch

scenarios.title: Turkish national, resident Istanbul — vehicle purchase from a licensed dealer (integration-stage control)
scenarios.profile: Salaried customer buying a vehicle from a licensed dealer; funds sit above the SoF threshold.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR · nationality TR · SoW/SoF = salary (+ savings)
scenarios.flow: C2B-15 vehicle purchase — licensed dealer beneficiary
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium — EDD mandatory; watch high-value-asset integration
scenarios.screening: Customer/dealer clear
scenarios.rating: Medium (High if funds are cash-origin / off-profile)
scenarios.documents: ID + PoA + salary evidence; dealer proforma/quote; source of funds above threshold (integration-stage control); confirm payment goes to the dealer, not a third party
scenarios.expectedActivity: One-off vehicle purchase proportionate to evidenced funds
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Luxury-asset integration (cash-origin funds into vehicles); straw-buyer signals; funds sourced from unrelated inflows
scenarios.outcome: Onboard/proceed, Medium with SoF evidenced; escalate on cash-origin or straw-buyer signals

scenarios.title: Turkish national — paying a gold/DPMS business (dual-use / DPMS value movement)
scenarios.profile: Customer with side gold-trading income paying a DPMS/gold-dealing business; some counterparties adjacent to sanctioned networks.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR · nationality TR · SoW = salary + gold · SoF = mixed
scenarios.flow: C2B-01/02 to a gold/DPMS business — high-value goods movement
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium; gold/DPMS + sanctions-evasion adjacency; EDD mandatory
scenarios.screening: Screen the DPMS business and its counterparties for sanctions adjacency; adverse media
scenarios.documents: ID + PoA + salary; for the gold activity: invoices, DPMS counterparty details, evidence the trade/business is licensed; export-control screening
scenarios.expectedActivity: Incidental, documented gold-related payments
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Gold value movement disproportionate to income; invoice manipulation; counterparties adjacent to sanctioned networks
scenarios.outcome: EDD if incidental and documented; escalate/decline on unlicensed DPMS or sanctions-adjacent counterparties

scenarios.title: Bangladeshi national, resident Dhaka — salaried, paying licensed businesses
scenarios.profile: Garment-sector salaried employee paying licensed businesses for goods, utilities and fees.
scenarios.geography: Residence BD · nationality BD · SoW/SoF = salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 goods · C2B-03 utilities · C2B-05 fees — licensed businesses
scenarios.corridor: US→BD Medium — goods-TBML adjacency, transaction laundering
scenarios.screening: Clear
scenarios.documents: ID; PoA <90d; employer letter + payslips + statements; invoice on request above tier
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; recurring utility/fee/goods payments proportionate to income
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Goods payments to non-goods businesses; MCC-vs-purpose mismatch; charity/education used as remittance cover
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium. Watch transaction-laundering and cover-purpose signals

scenarios.title: Bangladeshi student — large 'investment/brokerage' or 'crypto' funding off-profile (mule / scam)
scenarios.profile: Student funding an investment platform or crypto exchange at a scale inconsistent with a student profile; third-party control signals.
scenarios.geography: Residence BD · nationality BD · SoF incoherent with profile
scenarios.flow: C2B-11 investment / C2B-12 crypto-exchange funding
scenarios.corridor: US→BD Medium; money-muling / investment-scam (OS-TM-004/016/017)
scenarios.screening: Behavioural; platform licence + whitelist gate; VASP whitelist
scenarios.rating: High → override on confirmed mule / scam funding
scenarios.documents: Same-name rule; platform/VASP licensed-whitelist status; direct RFI with the customer (possible recruited victim); SoF for the funding
scenarios.expectedActivity: Student allowance only; no large investment/crypto funding
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Funding a third-party or unregulated 'investment' (Ponzi red flag); many-customers→same-new-business; rapid in-out; shared device/IP
scenarios.sarPosture: Confirmed mule / scam funding → freeze + SAR (victim-aware)
scenarios.outcome: Freeze + SAR; decline the payment (whitelist gate / off-profile)

scenarios.title: Indonesian resident — funding a licensed crypto exchange in own name (permitted-with-EDD)
scenarios.profile: Self-employed online seller funding a VARA/SCA-licensed exchange in own name, proportionate volume.
scenarios.geography: Residence ID · nationality ID · SoW/SoF = marketplace income
scenarios.flow: C2B-12 crypto-exchange funding — licensed/whitelisted VASP, same-name
scenarios.corridor: US→ID Medium; conduit-shape
scenarios.screening: Customer clear; VASP passes whitelist gate; wallet/chain screen
scenarios.rating: High floor (crypto-exchange funding), workable with EDD
scenarios.documents: Same-name confirmation; licensed-VASP whitelist status; wallet ownership + funding source + chain-analysis + travel-rule data; SoF (marketplace payouts + statements); velocity caps by tier
scenarios.expectedActivity: Proportionate funding to a licensed VASP in own name
scenarios.behaviourWatch: fiat→convert→out conduit shape; velocity above cap; funding shifts to unlicensed VASP; mixer adjacency
scenarios.outcome: Onboard/proceed, High/EDD on a licensed VASP; decline on unlicensed VASP; block on sanctioned-wallet

scenarios.title: Indonesian resident — paying an unregulated 'investment' business (Ponzi shape)
scenarios.profile: Customer funding an unregulated 'investment' business; many customers pay the same new business.
scenarios.geography: Residence ID · nationality ID
scenarios.flow: C2B-11 investment / brokerage funding — beneficiary unregulated
scenarios.corridor: US→ID Medium; investment-scam pattern; money-muling
scenarios.screening: Platform licence check; unregulated-beneficiary detection; adverse media on the business
scenarios.rating: High → decline on unregulated beneficiary; investment-scam review
scenarios.documents: Platform must be licensed/whitelisted; same-name preferred; SoF
scenarios.expectedActivity: Investment only to a regulated, licensed platform in own name
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Funding third-party investment accounts; unregulated 'investment'; many-customers→same-new-business fan-in
scenarios.sarPosture: Investment-scam / unlicensed deposit-taking → SAR; scheme review
scenarios.outcome: Decline (unregulated beneficiary) + SAR on scheme indicators

scenarios.title: Filipino national, resident Manila — salaried, paying licensed businesses
scenarios.profile: Salaried customer paying licensed businesses for goods, utilities, fees and travel.
scenarios.geography: Residence PH · nationality PH · SoW/SoF = salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 goods · C2B-03 utilities · C2B-13 travel — licensed businesses
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium — gaming/POGO payee, investment-scam funding, e-wallet mule
scenarios.screening: Clear; screen payees for gaming/POGO nexus
scenarios.documents: Passport/national ID; PoA; employer letter/payslip; invoice on request above tier
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; proportionate goods/utility/travel payments
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Gaming/POGO-linked business payee; investment-scam funding; e-wallet mule; charity-diversion
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium. Decline/escalate on gaming-business payee or scam funding

scenarios.title: Filipino national — paying a POGO / gaming-linked business (prohibited end-type)
scenarios.profile: Customer making payments to a gaming/POGO-linked business; chip-purchase-with-minimal-play cash-out pattern.
scenarios.segment: Any — the beneficiary type drives it
scenarios.geography: Residence PH · nationality PH
scenarios.flow: C2B to a gaming/casino/POGO business — a prohibited business type
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium; POGO/casino typologies
scenarios.screening: Beneficiary is a prohibited end-type (gaming/casinos)
scenarios.rating: Decline the payment to the gaming business; individual exposure → EDD + SAR
scenarios.documents: None rescue a prohibited-type payee; RFI on the customer's exposure
scenarios.expectedActivity: No gaming-business payments
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Bulk payouts to many beneficiaries via gaming; chip-purchase-minimal-play cash-out
scenarios.outcome: Decline payment to gaming business; EDD + SAR on the individual exposure

scenarios.title: Saudi national, resident Riyadh — affluent, high-value goods / vehicle purchase (PEP screen)
scenarios.profile: Affluent customer buying high-value goods / a vehicle from licensed dealers; large-ish payments.
scenarios.geography: Residence SA · nationality SA · SoW = salary/business
scenarios.flow: C2B-15 vehicle / C2B-01 high-value goods — licensed dealers
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium — high-value goods, PEP/state-linked, trade settlement
scenarios.screening: PEP/state-linked screen mandatory; dealer/vendor screened; adverse media
scenarios.rating: Medium, escalating to High if PEP-positive or state-linked
scenarios.documents: Passport/national ID; PoA; SoF for high-value payment (integration-stage control); dealer proforma; PEP screening; if PEP → corroborated SoW + senior approval; PEP-neutral wording
scenarios.expectedActivity: Proportionate high-value purchases with evidenced SoF
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Cash-origin funds into high-value goods; straw-buyer; PEP-linked vendor; unexplained wealth
scenarios.outcome: Onboard/proceed, Medium; High floor if PEP/state-linked with corroborated SoW; decline on unexplained wealth

scenarios.title: Yemeni national resident in Saudi Arabia — restricted-country SoW (Rule 1), paying SA businesses
scenarios.profile: Yemeni passport-holder, legal SA resident, salaried; pays SA licensed businesses. Some family SoW traces to Yemen.
scenarios.geography: Residence SA (permitted) · nationality YE (restricted, non-OFAC) · SoF = SA salary · partial SoW = Yemen family
scenarios.flow: C2B to SA licensed businesses; no Yemen beneficiary/corridor
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium; Yemen beneficiary/corridor blocked; restricted-nationality screening
scenarios.screening: Yemeni nationality → screening escalation + EDD flag; Rule 1 on the Yemen-origin SoW portion
scenarios.rating: High floor (restricted-country-SoW, Rule 1) with documented SoW, tenure, nexus screening, senior approval
scenarios.documents: Passport + SA residence + tenure; SA salary (SoF); Yemen-origin SoW: documentary origin + how proceeds left Yemen (remittance receipts) + nexus screening + senior-approval record; confirm no Yemen beneficiary
scenarios.expectedActivity: SA salary in; payments to SA licensed businesses only
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Yemen-based beneficiary (→ reject); unexplained top-ups from Yemen; restricted-country payee links
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD with senior sign-off; Yemen beneficiaries disabled. Unevidenced Yemen SoW → hold then decline

scenarios.title: Jordanian national, resident Amman — charity donation to a licensed charity (whitelist gate)
scenarios.profile: Salaried customer making regular donations to a UAE/JO-licensed charity via C2B.
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium) on a Medium-High corridor; TF-typology exposure
scenarios.geography: Residence JO · nationality JO · SoW/SoF = salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-10 charity donation (licensed) — licensed-charity whitelist enforced
scenarios.corridor: US→JO Medium-High — conflict-adjacency TF/NPO, charity channels; enhanced EDD
scenarios.screening: Customer clear; charity must pass the licensed-charity whitelist (hard control); NPO-diversion overlay; beneficiary/region screening
scenarios.documents: Baseline; charity's name + registration/licence + purpose; licensed-charity whitelist status; cap per period; corridor checks on onward flows where visible
scenarios.expectedActivity: Occasional donations to whitelisted licensed charities, proportionate to income
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Donations to unlicensed collectors; high-risk-geography NPOs; charity onward flows to conflict-adjacent zones; small-value aggregation-then-forward
scenarios.sarPosture: Unlicensed/conflict-adjacent NPO or TF indicators → decline the payment + STR/SAR (rapid reporting)
scenarios.outcome: Proceed for whitelisted licensed charities; decline + STR for unlicensed/conflict-adjacent NPOs

scenarios.title: Jordanian national — paying a cash-intensive 'money-changing / hawala-as-a-service' business (decline)
scenarios.profile: Customer routes value to a business whose activity is unlicensed money-changing / hawala-style value transfer dressed as a service.
scenarios.segment: Any — the beneficiary type drives it
scenarios.geography: Residence JO · nationality JO
scenarios.flow: C2B-02 'services' where the payee is an unlicensed MSB / hawala operation
scenarios.corridor: US→JO Medium-High; hawala/IVTS typology
scenarios.screening: Beneficiary business = unlicensed/unregistered MSB (a prohibited end-type / override)
scenarios.documents: RFI on the payee's activity/licence; if unlicensed money transmission → decline regardless of documents
scenarios.expectedActivity: Payments only to licensed service businesses
scenarios.behaviourWatch: IVTS pattern; missing settlement leg; funnel-through the business; cash-intensive
scenarios.sarPosture: Unlicensed MSB / hawala service → decline + SAR/escalate
scenarios.outcome: Decline + escalate + SAR

scenarios.title: Filipino OFW, resident UAE — salaried, paying licensed UAE businesses (goods/utilities/fees)
scenarios.profile: Overseas worker, salaried, paying licensed UAE businesses for goods, utilities and fees; occasional travel.
scenarios.segment: Migrant worker (High segment) resident in a hub jurisdiction
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted) · nationality PH · SoW/SoF = UAE salary
scenarios.flow: C2B-01 goods · C2B-03 utilities · C2B-09 fees · C2B-13 travel — licensed UAE businesses
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium; register rates UAE as a Critical hub for onward flows — watch chaining
scenarios.screening: Clear
scenarios.documents: Passport + Emirates ID + PoA; employer letter/payslip; invoice on request above tier
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; proportionate goods/utility/fee payments to licensed UAE businesses
scenarios.behaviourWatch: MCC-vs-purpose mismatch; goods to non-goods payee; onward chaining beyond the UAE payee
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium/monitored

scenarios.title: UAE resident — paying a real-estate / property-developer business (prohibited end-type / placement)
scenarios.profile: Customer paying a UAE real-estate brokerage / property developer; rapid asset purchase.
scenarios.segment: Any — the beneficiary type drives it
scenarios.geography: Residence AE · nationality any
scenarios.flow: C2B-04/other to a real-estate & construction business — a prohibited business type; real-estate placement typology
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium; real-estate placement (register typology 51)
scenarios.screening: Beneficiary = real-estate/construction (prohibited end-type per §6.4)
scenarios.rating: Decline the payment to a prohibited-type business; SoF EDD if a legitimate personal purchase is claimed
scenarios.documents: RFI on the payment purpose; SoF for any large payment (integration-stage); prohibited-type screen on the payee
scenarios.expectedActivity: No payments into real-estate/construction businesses on this perimeter
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Rapid asset purchase; cash-origin funds; placement-stage integration
scenarios.outcome: Decline payment to prohibited-type business; SoF EDD + SAR on placement signals

scenarios.title: Lebanese national, resident Dubai — restricted-country SoW (Rule 1), paying UAE businesses
scenarios.profile: Lebanese passport, Dubai resident (6-yr tenure), owns a UAE trading business; material SoW from Lebanon; pays UAE licensed businesses/suppliers.
scenarios.segment: Self-employed / business owner (High) with restricted-country SoW overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted, passes G0) · nationality LB (restricted, non-OFAC) · SoW = Lebanon family business + UAE business · SoF = UAE business
scenarios.flow: C2B-01/02 to UAE suppliers/businesses; any Lebanon beneficiary/corridor blocked
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium + Lebanon-origin SoW → Rule 1 High floor
scenarios.screening: Sanctions/PEP clear; restricted-country nexus screening on the Lebanese entity/counterparties; UAE payees screened
scenarios.rating: High (restricted-country-SoW floor, Rule 1); 12-month review, reduced limits, enhanced monitoring
scenarios.documents: Emirates ID + visa + tenure (Ejari + 6-month history); Lebanese company trade licence + audited financials/dividend vouchers + how proceeds left Lebanon (remittance receipts); UAE business trade licence; 3–6m UAE business statements (SoF); senior approval
scenarios.expectedActivity: UAE business income in; proportionate payments to UAE licensed suppliers
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Lebanon beneficiary (→ reject); restricted-country payee links; SoW top-ups that don't reconcile
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD, senior sign-off; Lebanon beneficiaries disabled. Unevidenced SoW/SoF → hold then decline

scenarios.title: UAE resident — paying a free-zone shell / re-export business with onward-to-Iran nexus (block)
scenarios.profile: Customer paying a free-zone entity with no substance, circular invoicing, onward value toward Iran / sanctioned counterparties; dual-use goods references.
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted) BUT sanctioned/onward-Iran nexus on the beneficiary side
scenarios.flow: C2B to a free-zone shell / re-export business with an Iran/sanctioned nexus
scenarios.corridor: Iran comprehensively sanctioned — any nexus blocks (CRAM §7.1); free-zone shell (typology 52), re-export TBML (49)
scenarios.screening: G1 fails — sanctioned nexus / no lawful economic purpose
scenarios.documents: None — no document cures a sanctioned nexus
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Onward-Iran nexus; sanctioned counterparties; circular invoicing; no substance
scenarios.sarPosture: Block + SAR; OFAC blocking report within 10 business days
scenarios.outcome: Block + SAR + OFAC report

scenarios.title: Born in Russia, German passport, resident in Turkey — birthplace flag only, paying EU/TR businesses
scenarios.profile: Born in Moscow; naturalised German; resident in Turkey; salaried; pays licensed EU/TR businesses for goods, subscriptions, travel; no Russian assets or corridor.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR (permitted) · nationality DE · birthplace RU (screening flag only) · no Russia money nexus
scenarios.flow: C2B-01/13/14 to licensed EU/TR businesses
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium
scenarios.screening: Rule 3 birth-country carve-out — birthplace alone does not prohibit; routes to enhanced screening behind the scenes. No Russian nationality; no money nexus. Payees screened
scenarios.documents: Baseline (passport, TR PoA, salary evidence) + enhanced adverse-media/screening pass; no extra customer docs unless screening surfaces something
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; proportionate payments to licensed businesses
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Russia-linked beneficiary or money nexus → re-score / escalate
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, screening disposition logged. Teaching point: birthplace ≠ nationality ≠ residence
